title: ICAR-IARI Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
shortInfo: Candidates should download and read the ICAR-IARI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

basic_details.job_title: ICAR-IARI Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Candidates should download and read the ICAR-IARI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Women, 3 years for OBC.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Genetics / Plant Breeding / Genetics and Plant Breeding / Biotechnology OR Equivalent degree OR 3 years of research experience after Master’s degree + at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the ICAR-IARI Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Associate I (RA-I) post at ICAR-IARI is scheduled for 29 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate I position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Genetics, Plant Breeding, Genetics and Plant Breeding, or Biotechnology, or an equivalent degree. Alternatively, 3 years of research experience after a Master's degree with at least one SCI journal publication is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate I position is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 47,000/- per month, plus 24% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this ICAR-IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration for this contractual position?
faq.answer: The project duration for this contractual position is until 26 December 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ICAR-IARI office in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific relaxation rules for age?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: 5 years for SC/ST/Women candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the ICAR-IARI Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Associate I (RA-I) post at ICAR-IARI is scheduled for 29 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.
